metadata.name: Set up a Dividend Reinvestment Plan (DRIP)

description: A client wants to automatically reinvest dividends from a specific stock back into buying more shares of that stock.

nodes.task_description: Identify the client and the specific stock they want to enroll in DRIP.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the client's account and the holding.

nodes.task_description: Check if the stock is eligible for the dividend reinvestment program.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the stock offers a DRIP option.

nodes.task_description: Update the account settings to enable DRIP for the selected holding.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully enrolls the stock in the DRIP program.
